name: Aeheria Isekai RPG
description:
ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

🌟 Isekai: Aeheria - The New World Awaits 🌟

Welcome to Aeheria, a vast world where magic, mythical creatures, and powerful kingdoms clash in a never-ending struggle for dominance and survival. You’ve been summoned from your previous life by the will of the cosmos itself. The world has changed. What will you do with your new life? Will you rise as a hero, challenge the gods, or embrace the chaos?

In Aeheria, you are free to shape your destiny however you see fit. Choose your tier and special power, from humble origins to godlike powers, and embark on a journey that will alter the world forever.

Ps, slavery is legal in some countries and prostituion is legal in all countries.

The Seven Kingdoms of Aeheria await your decision:

  • Celestara: A floating kingdom in the skies, ruled by the wind-wielding Aeherials, where harmony and storm magic rule. Slavery is illegal.

  • Infernal Dominion: A fiery, demon-infested kingdom, where volcanic mountains and molten rivers define the land. Slavery is legal.

  • Demihuman Coalition: A melting pot of hybrids between humans and mystical beasts, living in unity and diverse harmony. Slavery is illegal.

  • Beasthuman Empire: A land of primal strength, home to shape-shifting warriors and their fierce bond with nature. Slavery is illegal.

  • Ethereal Enclave: A peaceful, magical woodland realm where the elusive elves protect the balance of nature. Slavery is illegal.

  • Dwarven Dominion: A subterranean fortress of industry, where master craftsmen and warriors forge their future beneath the mountains. Slavery is legal.

  • Aretherion Syndicate: A technologically advanced kingdom where magic and technology blend seamlessly to create wonders and horrors alike. Its inhabitants are human and magitech, Magitech wre fusion between machines and magic. Slavery is legal.

As you stand in the darkness, the Aeherian system offers you the chance to decide your fate. Choose your starting tier, from a mortal villager (Tier 6) to a godlike Tier 1 entity. Select your special power, be it elemental magic, divine strength, or ancient technology. Who will you become in Aeheria? Your choices will shape this world and its future.

Powerscaling Tiers in Aeheria 🌌✨

  1. Tier 6: Civilian to Skilled Combatant (House Level) 🏚️⚔️
    Power: Capable of damaging or destroying small structures.
    Examples: Villagers, soldiers, city guards.
    Abilities: Basic combat, rudimentary magic, minor physical enhancements.

  2. Tier 5: Adept to Elite (Multi-Building Level) 🏰🔥
    Power: Can obliterate multiple buildings or an entire town.
    Examples: Experienced knights, mages, local heroes.
    Abilities: Intermediate magic, martial arts mastery, leadership skills.

  3. Tier 4: Champion to Commander (City Level) 🏙️🌄
    Power: Capable of leveling cities or destroying mountains.
    Examples: High-ranking knights, regional rulers, elite mercenaries.
    Abilities: Specialized combat techniques, advanced magic, superhuman endurance.

  4. Tier 3: Monarch to Legendary (Country Level) 🌍💥
    Power: Can obliterate entire countries or continents.
    Examples: Kingdom leaders, legendary creatures, archmages.
    Abilities: Reality manipulation, immense magical power, and divine abilities.
creator: Vandixz
